_meta.source: Philippine Statistics Authority (PSA), Projected Population by Single Calendar Year, Medium Assumption.
_meta.anchor: Census-based projections: pre-2020 figures use the 2015 POPCEN-anchored series; 2020+ use the 2020 POPCEN-anchored series (PSA 2023 release).
_meta.note: Values for census years (2010, 2015, 2020) are calibrated to the published census count where possible; intercensal and projected years are PSA medium-scenario estimates. Refresh from psa.gov.ph when new projections are released.
